panels.title: fix(preview): welcome headline -> 'Get good at talking to women. Practice with AI.'
panels.scene: A town crier stands on a box, ringing a bell. Villagers are huddled around him, looking worried. A large scroll reads: 'Welcome to...uh...' Knight stands to the side, looking unimpressed.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The headline... it's too long! No one will be able to read it!

panels.title: feat(onboarding): swap live /onboarding to v2 (Cal AI rhythm, 27 screens)
panels.scene: Knight presses a large red button labeled 'ONBOARDING V2'. Behind him, the entire village is picked up and placed into a complex, 27-room labyrinth. Villagers scream in delight and confusion.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: So many rooms! So many choices! My life has meaning now!

panels.title: feat(payment): grant subscription credits on trial/activate/renew (Plan 3) (#49)
panels.scene: A giant golden coin with 'PLAN 3' engraved on it descends from the heavens, showering the village with smaller coins. Villagers scramble to collect them.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Free credits! We are rich! We shall build a monument to Plan 3!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It just adds credits on subscription events.

panels.title: 9 commits. 3 features. 3 fixes. 1 onboarding revamp.
panels.scene: Knight leaning against a stone wall, looking tired. Villagers are erecting a giant statue of a calendar, with the inscription 'Cal AI Rhythm'.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Let us celebrate the rhythm of Cal AI forever!
